phases.description: We align the event goal, audience, content priorities, shot requirements, speaker access, and delivery timelines before the shoot.
phases.title: Event Brief and Content Goals

phases.description: We define interviews, speaker clips, booth coverage, social cut-downs, B-roll, and recap footage so the event day is focused.
phases.title: Shot List and Production Map

phases.description: We plan cameras, audio, lighting, crew roles, venue access, and backup workflows around the realities of the live event space.
phases.title: Crew and Equipment Planning

phases.description: Our crew captures the high-value moments while coordinating around sessions, attendees, speakers, and brand activations.
phases.title: On-Site Shoot Direction

phases.description: Footage is organized into a practical post-production roadmap for highlight reels, testimonials, clips, and long-form assets.
phases.title: Post-Event Asset Roadmap
